## About Me

Engineering robust full-stack web solutions with clean architecture, seamless API integration, and high performance.

Focused on scalable systems, optimized databases, and maintainable production-ready code.

## Current Focus

| Area | What I am exploring |
| --- | --- |
| **Full-Stack Engineering** | Building end-to-end web applications with robust backend architecture and responsive interfaces. |
| **System Architecture** | Designing scalable and maintainable software foundations built for performance. |
| **Database Optimization** | Optimizing queries, indexing, and schemas for high-concurrency workloads. |
| **Web APIs** | Engineering secure RESTful APIs for efficient client-server communication. |

## Featured Work

| Project | Focus | Why it matters |

| [**Attendance System**](https://github.com/HeryKurniawan123/webpkl.git) | Full-Stack Web Application | Automates attendance tracking and activity logging to improve administrative efficiency and data accuracy. |

## Research Direction

Designing scalable full-stack systems with high code integrity, optimized data structures, and production-grade reliability.
